## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] Frontend typecheck, tests, and build pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Backend tests and Ruff pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Deterministic evaluation passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests use fictional or synthetic data only

## Public-content checklist

- [ ] Independently authored; no employer/client/internal code or workflows
- [ ] No real people data, confidential policy, private endpoint, screenshot, or secret
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated where appropriate
